description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:2.7 Docker image and caches the vendor/ directory. Define two stages, test and deploy. Add a test job named test that runs in the test stage, runs the commands 'pip install hyde' and 'hyde gen', and is triggered on any commit where $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME is not $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH. Add a pages job named pages that runs in the deploy stage, runs the commands 'pip install hyde' and 'hyde gen -d public', publishes the public/ folder as a pages artifact, and is triggered only when $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME equals $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH.
